generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container forming the physical structure of the incubator"
]

instance HeatbedHeater : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed heater actuator for heating the incubator"
]

instance AirCirculationFan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuator for air circulation within the incubator"
]

instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi microcontroller for control of the incubator system"
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring internal conditions of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensorA_RawDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring internal conditions of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensorB_RawDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for ambient environment monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempSensor_RawDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensorA_RawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensorA
]

instance InternalTempSensorB_RawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensorB
]

instance ExternalTempSensor_RawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTempSensorA_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from internal temperature sensor A"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensorA_RawDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensorB_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from internal temperature sensor B"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensorB_RawDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTempSensor_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from external temperature sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempSensor_RawDataTransmitted
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for structural representation of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic thermal behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with free parameters for the incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, ControlLogicEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for adjusting model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InternalTempSensorA_Data, InternalTempSensorB_Data, ExternalTempSensor_Data, ThermalSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SensorDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software module for processing sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InternalTempSensorA_Data, InternalTempSensorB_Data, ExternalTempSensor_Data
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService
]

instance ControlLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control logic for adjusting heatbed and fan actuators based on optimization and safety requirements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InternalTempSensorA_Data, InternalTempSensorB_Data, ExternalTempSensor_Data, AnalyticalModel, ThermalSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalOptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in the incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InternalTempSensorA_Data, InternalTempSensorB_Data, ExternalTempSensor_Data, AnalyticalModel, ThermalSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionAndSafetyMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for geometric model visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GeometricModel
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predictive thermal simulation and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InternalTempSensorA_Data, InternalTempSensorB_Data, ExternalTempSensor_Data, AnalyticalModel, ThermalSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveThermalSimulationService
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of temperature data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureReadingInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationStatusInsight
]

instance ThermalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimization of heating and cooling processes to maintain desired setpoint temperature"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalityInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance FaultDetectionAndSafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for automated fault detection and safety monitoring to identify deviations from operational norms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, SafetyViolationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visualizing the geometric model of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive simulation of thermal dynamics using calibrated models to forecast system behavior under varying conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastInsight, StateEstimateInsight
]

instance TemperatureReadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature reading from sensors"
]

instance CalibrationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of model calibration"
]

instance OptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating the current optimality of the system operation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating a fault in the system based on sensor data and model analysis"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of the incubator structure"
]

instance ForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecast of thermal dynamics for system behavior under varying conditions"
]

instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing estimated internal state of the incubator system"
]

instance SafetyViolationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust the system in response to safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust heating and cooling for optimal temperature control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the incubator system"
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedContainer, HeatbedHeater, AirCirculationFan, RaspberryPi, InternalTemperatureSensorA, InternalTemperatureSensorB, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment using sensor data, with resulting data informing monitors that assess system safety and optimality. Violations detected by monitors trigger human or algorithmic interventions on the Physical Twin, as depicted in Figure 1 of Document 1."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through empirical comparison of simulation predictions against physical measurements, where the four-parameter thermal model demonstrated superior accuracy in predicting heatbed thermal inertia compared to the two-parameter model. Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data to correct discrepancies and maintain model validity."
]
